assertions.assertion: Output sets SaveTokens = true on the OpenIdConnect handler options
Output includes 'offline_access' in the OIDC scope list to enable refresh tokens
assertions.rationale: offline_access is added to scope list.

assertions.assertion: Output wires up RevokeRefreshTokenAsync() in the cookie OnSigningOut event handler
assertions.rationale: No OnSigningOut event handler is configured. Refresh tokens are not revoked on sign-out.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() to register user token management services
Output registers a named HTTP client using AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient with the user's access token
assertions.rationale: Uses AddHttpClient with AddUserAccessTokenHandler, which is equivalent.
